commit.message:
YARN-10788. TestCsiClient fails (#3989)

Create unix domain socket in java.io.tmpdir instead of
test.build.dir to avoid 'File name too long' error.

Reviewed-by: Ayush Saxena <ayushsaxena@apache.org>
